business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial Property - Building and Personal Property
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number CP-BIP-2025-4420; form CP 00 10 10 12. Schedule shows coinsurance 80% and deductible 75000.

Endorsement CP 15 08 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers actual loss of Business Income due to necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration, including continuing normal operating expenses and payroll.

Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Modifies Building and Personal Property coverage for loss in value of the undamaged portion of a building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to covered property caused by interruption of utility services, including water, communication, and power supply services.
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88), effective 2026-03-15. Suspends the coinsurance additional condition for property specified in the schedule during the declarations period.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to scheduled objects including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Policy - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 6512 Description: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio
